nasb.text: Then the king’s attendants, who served him, said, “Let beautiful young virgins be sought for the king.

esv.text: Then the king’s young men who attended him said, “Let beautiful young virgins be sought out for the king.

cnv.text: 於是有些侍臣對王說：“要差人為王尋找一些美貌的少女。

ccb.text: 王的侍臣说：“让人为王物色一些年轻貌美的处女吧。
